articles.title: Endicott baseball falls to Denison in hard-fought DIII  National Championship Series
articles.description:
The Gulls forced a winner-take-all Game 3 after a dramatic comeback victory in Game 2.

The post Endicott baseball falls to Denison in hard-fought DIII National Championship Series appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Endicott baseball team lost to Denison in DIII National Championship Series.
The Gulls forced a decisive Game 3 after winning Game 2 dramatically.
This loss impacts local sports morale and community support for Endicott athletics.

articles.title: Canton, Norfolk DA issue statements on texts included in Karen Read’s new lawsuit
articles.description:
“The messages are abhorrent, deeply offensive, hateful, and do not reflect the values of the Canton Police Department or its members.”

The post Canton, Norfolk DA issue statements on texts included in Karen Read’s new lawsuit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Canton Police Department condemned offensive texts revealed in Karen Read's lawsuit.
Norfolk DA stated the messages do not reflect department values.
Community concerns rise over police conduct and accountability in Canton.
